title: Eye-Friendly pack for Hypixel Skyblock
description: This texture pack changes the visual of several areas on Hypixel Skyblock. (The End, Glacite Tunnels, The Mist)
body:
This texture pack changes the visual of several areas on Hypixel Skyblock. (The End, Glacite Tunnels, The Mist)   
I put them in same pack cuz you basically only need this pack while doing es, mining or farm ghosts, they won't affect each other. And feel free to remove the part that you don't like.   
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aebafddbde32241cac13aa145bcc5ce63a4ac0b9_0.webp)
